description: The file '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/ExamAnxiety.csv' is already open in JASP. This is a real dataset (Field, 2013) from a study on academic performance with 103 students. Perform a linear regression analysis with 'Exam' as the dependent variable and 'Revise' and 'Anxiety' as covariates. The analysis must include descriptive statistics, model fit, and estimates.
